root_text.iti68:2.1: “Yassa kassaci, bhikkhave, rāgo appahīno, doso appahīno, moho appahīno—
root_text.iti68:2.2: ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, ‘baddho mārassa paṭimukkassa mārapāso yathākāmakaraṇīyo pāpimato’.
root_text.iti68:2.3: Yassa kassaci, bhikkhave, rāgo pahīno, doso pahīno, moho pahīno—
root_text.iti68:2.4: ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, ‘abaddho mārassa omukkassa mārapāso na yathākāmakaraṇīyo pāpimato’”ti.
root_text.iti68:4.1: Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.

translation_text.iti68:1.1: This was said by the Buddha, the Perfected One: that is what I heard.
translation_text.iti68:2.1: “Whoever has not given up greed, hate, and delusion
translation_text.iti68:2.2: is said to be trapped. They’re caught in Māra’s snare, and the Wicked One can do with them what he wants.
translation_text.iti68:2.3: Whoever has given up greed, hate, and delusion
translation_text.iti68:2.4: is said to be free. They’re released from Māra’s snare, and the Wicked One cannot do with them what he wants.”
translation_text.iti68:3.1: “Those in whom greed, hate, and ignorance
translation_text.iti68:3.3: belong with those who are evolved;
translation_text.iti68:3.6: they’ve given up everything, they say.”
translation_text.iti68:4.1: This too is a matter that was spoken by the Blessed One: that is what I heard.

variant_text.iti68:2.2: baddho → bandho (si, sya-all, pts-vp-pli1) | yathākāmakaraṇīyo → yathākāmakaraṇīyo ca (bj, sya-all, pts-vp-pli1, mr)
variant_text.iti68:2.4: na yathākāmakaraṇīyo → na yathākāmakaraṇīyo ca (sya-all, pts-vp-pli1)
